```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: "hide"
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(gapminder)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Hmisc)

gapminder <- gapminder
gapminder_2007 <- gapminder |> filter(year==2007)
gapminder_uk <- gapminder |> filter(country=="United Kingdom")
```
